untranslatable_reason: Eve & Eve double top requires detection of TWO distinct rounded peaks with specific 3% price variation and valley separation between them. This multi-bar, multi-peak pattern structure cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. Specifically: (1) identifying two rounded tops requires multi-bar slope analysis not available in indicator set, (2) measuring 3% variation between two specific historical peaks requires lookback pattern matching, (3) valley detection between peaks requires local minimum identification across a range. The conversion captures the confirmation signal (close below support) and volume ratio on right peak, but loses the core pattern geometry detection.
